arts.ttl: Tottenham come from behind to rescue point at Rangers in pulsating Battle of Britain
arts.sum: RANGERS 1-1 SPURS: Ange Postecoglou's return to Scotland proved to be a difficult one as his side were forced to come from behind to secure a Europa League point against Philippe Clement's side

arts.ttl: Ange raves about the power of Rangers fans as Tottenham boss confesses they force you to 'climb a mountain'
arts.sum: The North London side had to come from behind to claim a share of the points at Ibrox

arts.ttl: What the pundits said as Peter Crouch swoons over 'fantastic' Rangers and shares delight after 'travesty' swerved
arts.sum: Philippe Clement's men came tantalisingly close to claiming a famous Premier League scalp at Ibrox

arts.ttl: Tottenham struggles continue but they earn thrilling draw with Rangers
arts.sum: Rangers 1-1 Tottenham: An entertaining clash at Ibrox saw Dejan Kulusevski earn Spurs a draw after Hamza Igamane had given Gers the lead

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel tells Celtic how to inflict final misery on Rangers as he makes priorities clear amid contract talk
arts.sum: The Dane signed a one-year deal with a 12-month option with Brendan Rodgers holding the power to trigger at any time

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski makes 'perfect' Rangers admission as Swede admits beautiful Ibrox crowd influenced Ange's Tottenham
arts.sum: But the Light Blues finished stronger - and Kulusevski has admitted that the noise generated helped Rangers play the 'perfect game'. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Rangers WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: Rangers 1-1 Tottenham: Player ratings as Kulusevski snatches Europa League point for Spurs

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski comes off bench to get Tottenham draw at Rangers
arts.sum: Humza Igamane had put Rangers ahead.

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski finds one word to describe Ibrox Stadium after playing there for the first time with Tottenham
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s poor run continues after they were held to a 1-1 draw by Glasgow Rangers in Thursday’s Europa League clash at Ibrox. Spurs struggled...

arts.ttl: Rangers 1-1 Tottenham Hotspur: Highlights, man of the match, stats
arts.sum: Rangers and Tottenham Hotspur share spoils with 1-1 draw on Thursday evening in the Europa League, dashing Ange Postecoglou's hopes of a winning return to Glasgow.
